text: All portable fire extinguishers must be capable of being

options.text: A) Carried by hand to a fire
B) Carried or rolled to a fire
D) Used on class HB" fires

explanation: Portable fire extinguishers are designed to be mobile so they can be immediately brought to the site of an incipient fire. Their size and weight are constrained by regulations to ensure a single crew member can transport and operate them.
